user_outcome: A release operator can remove every unverified semantic byte authored by S01 and return the track to S01's immutable start tree before a corrected bounded-navigation replacement begins.
rationale: S01 reached a terminal re_slice_required lifecycle after fresh verification found incomplete full-domain reachability evidence. Baton requires a verified rollback before replacement functionality may use the track as a baseline.
in_scope: Restore the exact Git mode and object identity of internal/board/discovery.go, internal/board/discovery_test.go, internal/tui/board.go, internal/tui/model.go, internal/tui/releases.go, internal/tui/tui.go, and internal/tui/tui_test.go to their values at S01 start commit e2e445f0c63e2cf6408755faf259419b5ed621a6.
Restore the three screenshots/S01-tui-bounded-navigation/*.txt paths to their absence at S01 start commit e2e445f0c63e2cf6408755faf259419b5ed621a6.

Derive and prove the rollback envelope from Git, covering every non-release-record path changed between S01 start commit e2e445f0c63e2cf6408755faf259419b5ed621a6 and preserved review scope 737fb77b3a9a7aba294127a24ec3f7deee11d8a0; fail if that candidate set differs from the ten declared touchpoints.
Run the targeted board/TUI/CLI tests, full Go suite, go vet, and gofmt check after restoration so the exact start-tree content remains buildable and test-clean.
Emit a reachability artefact containing the live git diff/tree-equality command and exit code; this rollback is not integration-ready until a fresh verifier returns PASS.
out_of_scope: Reimplementing bounded catalog discovery, height-aware pane windows, directional focus navigation, or terminal-frame evidence is owned by S03-tui-bounded-navigation-replacement and cannot begin before this rollback verifies.
Editing S01 release records or erasing its maintainability report ledger is forbidden; S01 remains a deferred terminal re_slice_required historical record linked to this rollback.
Changing any path outside the ten Git-derived S01 semantic touchpoints is out of scope.

effort_complexity.rationale: The exact target modes, objects, and absences are immutable Git facts over ten paths, and the rollback adds no new behaviour.

risks.description: A hand-selected rollback could leave an S01-authored path behind and let failed bytes become S03's baseline.
risks.mitigation: Derive the complete candidate set from the immutable start and preserved review head, compare it to the declared touchpoints, and require exact mode/object/absence equality.

risks.description: The rollback could erase lifecycle evidence instead of only semantic bytes.
risks.mitigation: Exclude docs/release/2026-07-18-tui-bounded-navigation/** from the semantic envelope and preserve S01's status, journal, proof, and maintainability report ledger.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN the rollback candidate set is derived with Git from S01 start commit e2e445f0c63e2cf6408755faf259419b5ed621a6 through preserved review scope 737fb77b3a9a7aba294127a24ec3f7deee11d8a0 while excluding docs/release/2026-07-18-tui-bounded-navigation/**, THE SYSTEM SHALL identify exactly the seven internal Go paths and three screenshots/S01-tui-bounded-navigation/*.txt paths declared in touchpoints, with no missing or extra path.

WHEN S02 reaches its implementation head, THE SYSTEM SHALL make every declared rollback touchpoint byte-for-byte and mode-for-mode equal to S01 start commit e2e445f0c63e2cf6408755faf259419b5ed621a6, including absence of all three screenshots, and `git diff --exit-code e2e445f0c63e2cf6408755faf259419b5ed621a6 <implementation-head> -- <all ten touchpoints>` SHALL exit 0.

WHEN the exact rollback tree is present, THE SYSTEM SHALL make `env GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false /usr/local/go/bin/go test ./internal/board ./internal/tui ./cmd/sworn`, `env GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false /usr/local/go/bin/go test ./...`, `env GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false /usr/local/go/bin/go vet ./...`, and `test -z "$(/usr/local/go/bin/gofmt -l .)"` exit 0 without network access, token spend, or a new runtime dependency.

WHEN S02 is inspected after implementation, THE SYSTEM SHALL retain S01 as state deferred with maintainability.state re_slice_required, rollback_slice_id S02-tui-bounded-navigation-rollback, the original report ledger unchanged, and verification.result fail; S03-tui-bounded-navigation-replacement SHALL remain planned and SHALL NOT have a start_commit until S02 is freshly verified.
